title: MinerU
summary: Document parsing engine with three notable architectural patterns: (1) Async task API (POST /tasks with status querying and result retrieval) — partial answer to resumable extraction, (2) mineru-router for multi-service multi-GPU load balancing with unified API, (3) MCP server integration for Cursor/Claude Desktop/Windsurf.  VLM+OCR dual engine with sliding window for long docs.
creator_view: Document parsing engine with three notable architectural patterns: (1) Async task API (POST /tasks with status querying and result retrieval) — partial answer to resumable extraction, (2) mineru-router for multi-service multi-GPU load balancing with unified API, (3) MCP server integration for Cursor/Claude Desktop/Windsurf. VLM+OCR dual engine with sliding window for long docs. v3.0.0 released today — thread-safe concurrent inference, streaming writes. AGPL-3.0.
creatorLens: Document parsing engine with three notable architectural patterns: (1) Async task API (POST /tasks with status querying and result retrieval) — partial answer to resumable extraction, (2) mineru-router for multi-service multi-GPU load balancing with unified API, (3) MCP server integration for Cursor/Claude Desktop/Windsurf. VLM+OCR dual engine with sliding window for long docs. v3.0.0 released today — thread-safe concurrent inference, streaming writes. AGPL-3.0.

context.t28Relevance: QS-only but architecturally informative. Async task API addresses Gap Agent A Q5 (progressive extraction). Router pattern is deployment, not architecture. AGPL-3.0 limits adoption.
notablePatterns: Async task API (POST /tasks) with status polling — resumable extraction pattern
VLM+OCR dual engine (pipeline/vlm-engine/hybrid-engine) — three extraction strategies
Sliding window + streaming writes for long documents
MCP server for agentic AI integration
